composition.provenance: frozen FastChem/Asplund-2009 [M/H]=0, C/O=0.55, T=1500 K, P=0.1 bar

stellar_metallicity.provenance: TEPCat WASP-17 Southworth solution; provenance only

version_2_picaso_environment.known_harmless_warning: optional Vega spectrum absent; Version 2 uses an explicit blackbody star

spectral_contract.grid_definition: ceil(R*ln(lambda_max/lambda_min)) equal-log bins with exact endpoints
spectral_contract.native_lower_edge_closure: when a correlated-k table stores a first bin centre above 0.3 micron, its first native value closes that bin to its physical 0.3 micron edge for R=100 integration; no synthetic point is stored as native data
